zh.lifeSummary: 當Edmund De Appleby II於1322年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾阿波萊比 馬尼亞時，他的父親Edmund De Appleby I26歲，母親Joan De Appleby22歲。他於1351年與Agnes De Solney在英國英格蘭德比夏爾德比結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1400年在英國萊希斯特斯爾阿利可頓享年78歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edmund De Appleby II于1322年出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾阿波萊比 馬尼亞时，他的父亲Edmund De Appleby I26岁，母亲Joan De Appleby22岁。他于1351年与Agnes De Solney在英国英格兰德比夏爾德比结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1400年在英国萊希斯特斯爾阿利可頓享年78岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Appleby
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from any of various places, for example in Leicestershire, Lincolnshire, and Cumbria, named from Old English æppel or Old Norse epli ‘apple’ + Old Norse bȳ ‘farm’.

nameMeanings.name: Edmund
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + mund ‘protector’. It was borne by several early royal and saintly figures, including a 9th-century king of East Anglia killed by invading Danes, allegedly for his adherence to Christianity. In the 16th and 17th centuries, there was a good deal of interchange between Edmund and Edward.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Edmund De Appleby II was born in 1322, in Appleby Magna, Leicestershire, England, his father, Edmund De Appleby I, was 26 and his mother, Joan De Appleby, was 22. He married Agnes De Solney in 1351, in Derby, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 7 daughters. He died in 1400, in Allexton, Leicestershire, England, at the age of 78.

Il a épousé Agnes De Solney en 1351, à Derby, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé en 1400, à Allexton, Leicestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 78 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Edmund De Appleby II è nato il nel 1322 nel Appleby Magna, Leicestershire, England, il suo padre, Edmund De Appleby I, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Joan De Appleby, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Agnes De Solney nel 1351, nel Derby, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 7 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Edmund De Appleby IIが1322年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアアップレビー マグナで生まれた時，父Edmund De Appleby Iは26歳，母Joan De Applebyは22歳であった。1351年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアデルビーでAgnes De Solneyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1400年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアアレクストンで78歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Edmund De Appleby II(이)가 1322년 영국 레이스스터실르 애플레비 매그나에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Edmund De Appleby I(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan De Appleby(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1351년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 더비에서 Agnes De Solney(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1400년 영국 레이스스터실르 앨렉스턴에서 78세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edmund De Appleby II родился в 1322 г. в местности эпплеби магна, лисестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Edmund De Appleby I было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan De Appleby, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes De Solney в 1351 г. в местности дирби, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 7 дочерей. Он умер в 1400 г. в местности аллекстон, лисестиршир, Англия в возрасте 78 лет.
